item.title: How I Over-Engineered This Blog Instead of Paying $10
item.description: How I Over-Engineered This Blog Instead of Paying $10 Am I too late to the blogging scene? Probably, yes. Who reads blogs these days, huh? I do, and probably a very small set of people like me do.

item.title: Hello 👋🏻
item.description: Hi, I’m Krishnanand V P, a very curious human being, software engineer, and an imperfect work in progress. I love writing code, and while I sometimes struggle to keep my curiosity in check, it has mostly worked in my favour.
